div.p: Pairwise comparison: same (index, term) ⇒ same command
If two logs contain an entry with the same (index, term), Then all entries up to that index are identical. This is the inductive proof that logs converge.
∀ i, j, idx: log[i][idx].term = log[j][idx].term → log[i][idx].command = log[j][idx].command
